case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. VLADIMIR MORENO et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, VLADIMIR DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-21-2008
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-07-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JAN-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, VLADIMIR
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-23-2008 CONTINUED TO AUG-22-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-22-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.82 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, VLADIMIR
DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CCP 585(D). FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF INTEREST IN EXCESS OF 10% AND ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, VLADIMIR $4,261.48 PRINCIPAL, $1,963.26 INTEREST, $293.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,518.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
